title: Garam Masala Dum Crostal
description: A buttery, silky Croatian dish featuring garam masala and dum, perfect for a summer or monsoon meal.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in finely chopped onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Fold in diced tomatoes along with chicken or vegetable broth. Simmer for about 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Sprinkle garam masala, cumin seeds, a pinch of cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and pepper over the mixture.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for another 25-30 minutes until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve warm over steamed rice or noodles. Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
